description_long: This object consists of a group of five axes, each with distinct handle and blade designs, arranged upright in a row. The handles are primarily wooden, with some featuring decorative wrappings, metal bands, or carved details, and vary in color from light tan to dark brown. The axe heads are forged from dark metal, with a range of blade shapes including broad bearded edges, double-edged forms, and pointed poll ends. The blades exhibit a matte, slightly rough finish, and some have visible rivets or fasteners securing them to the handles. The overall appearance suggests a mix of traditional and fantasy-inspired designs, suitable for display, collection, or practical use. No visible brand markings or labels are present on any of the axes.
description: A set of five axes with varied wooden handles and dark metal blades, featuring both traditional and decorative designs. The axes display a mix of broad, bearded, and double-edged blades with detailed handle wrappings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five axes side by side, highlighting the differences in handle color, wrapping, and blade shape.
description_view_1: Edge-on view of the central axe, emphasizing the thickness of the handle and the profile of the blade.
description_view_2: Rear view of the axes, displaying the back of the blades and the full length of the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the axes from the other edge, with handle details and blade profiles visible.
attribute_handle_type: Handles are straight or slightly contoured, made of wood with some wrapped in leather or cord, featuring round or oval cross-sections and decorative bands.
attribute_blade_design: Blades are single or double-edged, with broad, bearded, or pointed profiles; some have decorative rivets or extended polls.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and pinned mounting with visible fasteners and metal bands.
